name: cuebook
description: Use Cuebook memory and market data to sharpen a creator-owned idea and express it as one editorial Frame.

interface.shortDescription: Sharpen a market idea and make its logic visible
interface.longDescription: Cuebook has two public skills. Query recognizes twelve request families and can combine Cues with persisted market state, sealed candles, news, filings, disclosures, positioning, events, calendars, prediction markets, themes, briefings, settlements, and published Frames without writing. When separately configured, bounded TradingView Desktop and network observations can join the creator's research process, including one focused chart capture that removes surrounding UI while preserving latest structure, key levels, axes, and viewport restoration. Create gives a market intuition a five-beat Cuebook experience: recognize the creator's non-obvious edge, expand it with the smallest useful Cue or data relationship, lock the exact thought once, reveal one relationship visually, and preserve it with a future checkpoint. It can project an explicitly confirmed level, zone, checkpoint, note, or historical segment onto the creator's local TradingView chart while preserving existing drawings. Frame defaults to Cuebook-native data and pixels. An official TradingView snapshot may enter only through the attributed finished-bitmap path with known overlay rights, an applicable backend price lock, undistorted geometry, exact dimensions, image audit, and explicit creator selection. The public Frame still contains only a title, reasoned body, image reference, and alt text. Observed history and unresolved future time remain visibly separate, no future price path is fabricated, and workflow, providers, evidence lineage, hashes, upload, consent, and authorization state remain backstage. Publication happens only after explicit intent; withdrawal alone requires separate consent.
defaultPrompt: Show me Cuebook's latest BTC Cues, market state, and source-linked context.
Compare COIN and HOOD using Cuebook's latest sourced context.
Turn my BTC view into a Frame; ask for my horizon or help me choose one from relevant Cues.
